description_long: This ornate stone fountain features a tall, intricately sculpted central column with arched openings and decorative spires at the top. The structure is set on a multi-tiered octagonal base, with each tier displaying detailed stonework and symmetrical steps leading up to the main platform. The central section includes elaborate reliefs, ornamental motifs, and what appear to be basins or troughs for water collection. The upper portion is crowned with pointed finials and a domed roof, giving the fountain a neo-Gothic or Victorian architectural style. The stone surfaces show signs of weathering, adding to the historical character of the piece. The fountain is surrounded by a paved stone platform, suggesting it is designed as a prominent urban landmark.
description: A grand, neo-Gothic stone fountain with a tall, ornate central column, arched openings, and an octagonal multi-tiered base, richly decorated with sculptural details.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main arched opening and the symmetrical steps leading up to the fountain, with the central spire and decorative finials clearly visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the intricate reliefs and ornamental motifs on the central column are prominent, and the layered octagonal base is well defined.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the depth of the arched opening and the symmetry of the fountain's structure, with the upper spire and domed roof in clear view.
description_view_3: This view showcases the side profile of the fountain, revealing the detailed stonework on the base and the elegant proportions of the central column.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is adorned with neo-Gothic decorative elements, including pointed finials, sculpted reliefs, and intricate stone carvings. The upper section features spires and a domed roof, while the central column is embellished with ornamental motifs and arches.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is octagonal and multi-tiered, with each level featuring defined rims and steps. The structure includes several compartments or troughs for water collection, integrated into the stonework.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the current state of the fountain.
